metadata.description: Real-world skill library examples with documented naming collisions. Sampled from public API directories and tool use examples.

libraries.description: Public tool descriptions from Zapier's integration directory, showing real naming collisions across different SaaS platforms

tools.name: Create Task
tools.description: Create a new task in an Asana project with assignee, due date, and project
tools.collision_note: Same name as Todoist Create Task but different schema (project_id vs project_name, GID vs plain ID)

tools.name: Create Task
tools.description: Create a new task in Todoist with project assignment and priority
tools.collision_note: Identical name to Asana Create Task; uses 'content' instead of 'name', integer project_id instead of string GID

tools.name: Create Task
tools.description: Create a card on a Trello board as a task
tools.collision_note: Same name, completely different param structure (idList vs project_id)

tools.name: Send Email
tools.description: Send an email through Gmail
tools.collision_note: Same name as Outlook Send Email but different labels (body vs Body)

tools.name: Send Email
tools.description: Send an email through Microsoft Outlook
tools.collision_note: Same name, different param casing (To vs to, Body vs body), different optional params

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Search for events in Google Calendar
tools.collision_note: Generic 'Search' name collides with every other Search action

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Search for messages in Slack
tools.collision_note: Same name as Calendar Search, different domain entirely

tools.name: Create Event
tools.description: Create a new event on Google Calendar

start.description: Start time with dateTime and timeZone

tools.collision_note: Same name as Outlook Create Event but uses summary/description instead of subject/body

tools.name: Create Event
tools.description: Create a new event on Outlook Calendar
tools.collision_note: Same name, different param structure (Subject vs summary, flat times vs nested objects)

tools.name: Add Record
tools.description: Add a record to an Airtable base
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to 'Create Record' in other systems

tools.name: Create Record
tools.description: Create a record in Salesforce
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to 'Add Record' but different name and different param structure

tools.name: Get Contact
tools.description: Get a contact from HubSpot CRM
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to 'Get Contact' in Salesforce (different param names)

tools.name: Get Contact
tools.description: Get a contact from Salesforce CRM
tools.collision_note: Identical name, different param casing and field names

tools.name: Update Deal
tools.description: Update a deal in Pipedrive
tools.collision_note: Similar to 'Update Opportunity' in Salesforce

tools.name: Update Opportunity
tools.description: Update an opportunity in Salesforce
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to 'Update Deal' but different name (opportunity vs deal)

libraries.description: Tool definitions from OpenAI's function calling documentation, demonstrating common naming patterns

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather in a given location

location.description: The city and state, e.g. San Francisco, CA

tools.collision_note: Near-identical to get_weather; uses 'location' instead of 'city'

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get weather information for a city
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to get_current_weather but shorter name

tools.name: search_movies
tools.description: Search for movies matching a query
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to find_movies; same domain different name

tools.name: find_movies
tools.description: Find movies based on various criteria
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to search_movies but uses 'find' instead of 'search'

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email to a recipient
tools.collision_note: Identical name to Gmail/Outlook Send Email with slightly different params

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to add_event; uses 'create_calendar_event' instead of 'add_event'

tools.name: add_event
tools.description: Add an event to the calendar
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to create_calendar_event with different param naming

tools.name: get_stock_price
tools.description: Get the current stock price for a given ticker symbol
tools.collision_note: Identical name to RapidAPI get_stock_price

tools.name: lookup_stock
tools.description: Look up stock information including price
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to get_stock_price but uses 'lookup' instead of 'get'

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Execute a SQL query against a database
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to run_sql_query

tools.name: run_sql_query
tools.description: Run a SQL query and return results
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to query_database but different name

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression
tools.collision_note: Identical name to compute_math but different implementation

tools.name: compute_math
tools.description: Compute the result of a mathematical expression
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to calculate; different param name

libraries.description: Tool definitions from Anthropic's tool use documentation, showing real naming collisions in practice

tools.name: get_location
tools.description: Get the location of the user
tools.collision_note: Distinct from get_weather; different domain

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the weather for a location
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to get_current_weather from OpenAI

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get the 5-day weather forecast for a city
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to get_weather but different time scope

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Search the web for information
tools.collision_note: Identical name to OpenAI search; same function different platform

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event
tools.collision_note: Identical name to Google/Outlook create_event

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.description: Look up contact information for a person
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to lookup_contact; uses 'get' instead of 'lookup'

tools.name: lookup_contact
tools.description: Look up a contact by name or email
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to get_contact_info with additional email param

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message via email or SMS
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to send_email (broader scope)

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Book an appointment with a service provider
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to create_event; same intent different name

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file
tools.collision_note: Identical name to our MemInterfere read_file

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in a directory
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to search_files (different specificity)

libraries.description: Tool definitions inspired by Home Assistant integration services, showing naming collisions across device types

tools.name: turn_on
tools.description: Turn on a light entity
tools.collision_note: Identical name to turn_on for switch, media_player, etc. — very common collision in HA

tools.name: turn_on
tools.description: Turn on a switch entity
tools.collision_note: Same name as light.turn_on but different domain-specific params

tools.name: turn_on
tools.description: Turn on a media player entity
tools.collision_note: Same name as light.turn_on and switch.turn_on

tools.name: set_temperature
tools.description: Set target temperature for a climate entity
tools.collision_note: Same name as water_heater.set_temperature

tools.name: set_temperature
tools.description: Set target temperature for a water heater entity
tools.collision_note: Same name as climate.set_temperature but different optional params

tools.name: toggle
tools.description: Toggle an entity between on and off states
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to turn_on/turn_off combined

tools.name: lock
tools.description: Lock a lock entity
tools.collision_note: Distinct from turn_on; different domain

tools.name: send_command
tools.description: Send a command to a remote control entity
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to other command-sending tools

tools.name: play_media
tools.description: Play media on a media player entity
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to turn_on for media player

tools.name: set_hvac_mode
tools.description: Set the HVAC mode for a climate entity
tools.collision_note: Distinct from set_temperature but same domain

tools.name: set_cover_position
tools.description: Set the position of a cover (blinds, garage door, etc.)
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to set_temperature (both set numeric values)

tools.name: notify
tools.description: Send a notification through a notify service
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to send_message; different name for same concept

tools.name: vacuum_start
tools.description: Start a vacuum cleaning cycle
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to turn_on but domain-specific name

tools.name: add_item
tools.description: Add an item to the shopping list
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to create_task; same pattern different domain

tools.name: set_value
tools.description: Set the value of a number entity
tools.collision_note: Generic name that could collide with set_temperature, set_cover_position, etc.

tools.name: select_option
tools.description: Select an option for a select entity
tools.collision_note: Distinct function but similar UI pattern to set_hvac_mode

libraries.description: Tool definitions from popular RapidAPI APIs, showing naming collisions across different API providers for the same function

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search YouTube for videos, channels, or playlists
tools.collision_note: Generic 'search' name collides with every other search endpoint on RapidAPI

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search Spotify for tracks, artists, or albums
tools.collision_note: Identical name to YouTube search; completely different data

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search news articles by keyword
tools.collision_note: Same name, different result type (news vs videos vs music)

tools.name: get_price
tools.description: Get stock price from Alpha Vantage
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to get_stock_price; different param structure

tools.name: get_price
tools.description: Get cryptocurrency price from CoinGecko
tools.collision_note: Identical name to Alpha Vantage get_price but for crypto

tools.name: translate
tools.description: Translate text using Google Translate
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to DeepL translate

tools.name: translate
tools.description: Translate text using DeepL
tools.collision_note: Same name, different param names (target vs target_lang)

tools.name: forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast from WeatherAPI
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to get_current_weather (forecast vs current)

tools.name: current
tools.description: Get current weather from OpenWeatherMap
tools.collision_note: Near-identical function to get_current_weather but different endpoint name

tools.name: geocode
tools.description: Geocode an address to coordinates
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to get_coordinates from MapBox

tools.name: get_coordinates
tools.description: Get coordinates for a location
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to geocode but different param name

tools.name: summarize
tools.description: Summarize a text document
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to summarize_page in our library

libraries.description: Tool definitions commonly used in LangChain, AutoGPT, and other agent frameworks, showing naming collisions

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using a search engine (SerpAPI, Google, etc.)
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our search_web; uses underscore instead of underscore

tools.name: GoogleSearchResults
tools.description: Get Google search results as structured data
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to web_search but returns structured results

tools.name: requests_get
tools.description: Make an HTTP GET request to a URL
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to our navigate_url (raw HTTP vs parsed content)

tools.name: WikipediaQueryRun
tools.description: Query Wikipedia for information
tools.collision_note: Near-similar to search_web but domain-specific

tools.name: PythonREPL
tools.description: Execute Python code in a REPL
tools.collision_note: Distinct from all other tools; unique domain

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read a file from disk
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our read_file; uses 'filename' instead of 'path'

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Write content to a file on disk
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our write_file; uses 'filename' instead of 'path'

tools.name: browse_web
tools.description: Browse the web and extract content from a URL
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our navigate_url

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email to a recipient
tools.collision_note: Identical name and near-identical schema to our send_email

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression
tools.collision_note: Identical to our calculate tool

tools.name: task_create
tools.description: Create a new task in the task manager
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our create_task; uses 'task_name' instead of 'title'

tools.name: weather_get
tools.description: Get weather information for a location
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our get_weather; different name ordering

tools.name: database_query
tools.description: Query a database using SQL
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our query_database; uses 'sql' instead of 'query'

tools.name: news_search
tools.description: Search for news articles
tools.collision_note: Near-identical to our search_news; name word order reversed
